/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/emerald_xtrx.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libemerald_xtrx.so -o libemerald_xtrx.so CMakeFiles/emerald_xtrx.dir/emerald_xtrx_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emerald_xtrx.dir/emerald_xtrx.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/bfr/devel/github_procmt_2021/procmt_2021/out/build/Clang 19.1.7 x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/libxml/measdocxml:/home/bfr/devel/github_procmt_2021/procmt_2021/out/build/Clang 19.1.7 x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/libxml/tinyxml2:" ../measdocxml/libmeasdocxml.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1 ../tinyxml2/libtinyxml2.so
